summary: Phase 2 Redesign Testing Complete. Verified TopicLandingPage, PackageLandingPage, and PublicExpertsPage. All public pages working correctly. Full UI testing of authenticated TopicLandingPage and PackageLandingPage blocked due to Google OAuth (no username/password login available).
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PublicExpertsPage: Shows all 31 experts with photos, ratings (4.6-4.9), specializations, and tags
✓ PublicExpertsPage: API endpoint fixed to /api/simplified/experts/all - returns 31 experts
✓ PublicExpertsPage: Cream background (#FBF8F3), white cards (#FFFFFF), proper shadows
✓ PublicExpertsPage: Search, filter by modality, back navigation all working
✓ PublicTopicsPage: 22 topic tiles displayed across 4 categories (Love, Career, Health, Fertility)
✓ PublicTopicsPage: 'Coming Soon' badges on Fertility category tiles
✓ PublicTopicsPage: Topic tile click redirects to /login for unauthenticated users
✓ TopicLandingPage (Code Review): Cream background with white card sections
✓ TopicLandingPage (Code Review): Pill-shaped tier selector tabs (Focussed, Supported, Comprehensive)
✓ TopicLandingPage (Code Review): Tier summary card with duration, consultation, follow-ups, chat info
✓ TopicLandingPage (Code Review): Outcomes section with 3 columns (Clarity, Timeline, Support)
✓ TopicLandingPage (Code Review): Sticky CTA bar with price and 'Start my journey' button (peach bg)
✓ PackageLandingPage (Code Review): Cream background with white card sections
✓ PackageLandingPage (Code Review): Package overview card with details and pricing
✓ PackageLandingPage (Code Review): Sticky CTA bar with 'Start my journey' button (peach bg)
✓ Theme colors verified: teal.primary=#4A9B8E, peach.primary=#E8A87C, background.primary=#FBF8F3

success_rate.frontend: 100% for public pages, Code review PASS for authenticated pages

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 design verification complete via code review. TopicLandingPage and PackageLandingPage have all required design elements (ResponsiveHeader, cream background, white cards, pill selectors, sticky CTA with peach button). Live UI testing requires Google OAuth which is not available for automated testing. Public pages (experts, topics) fully tested with 31 experts showing.

public_experts_page.expert_specializations: PASS - Modality labels shown (Vedic Astrologer, Career Coach, etc)
public_experts_page.expert_tags: PASS - Tags displayed per expert (3 tags)

public_topics_page.coming_soon_badge: PASS - Fertility category has Coming Soon badge
public_topics_page.tile_click_redirect: PASS - Clicks redirect to /login for unauthenticated users

topic_landing_page_code_review.pill_tier_selector: PASS - rounded-full class on tier tabs

limitations: TopicLandingPage and PackageLandingPage live UI testing blocked - requires Google OAuth authentication
Admin credentials (NiroAdmin/NewAdmin@123) provide API token but not user session for frontend app
